meaning.zh: 優雅的追求、浪漫、情感的使者、直覺的引導。
meaning.en: Elegant pursuit, romance, messenger of emotions, intuitive guidance.

ecology.zh: 石虎少年在領地邊緣穿梭，尋找屬於自己的水源與家園。
ecology.en: A juvenile leopard cat traversing territory edges searching for home.

generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. An elegant and introspective anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat (Knight) riding a mystical feline-steed across a shallow river. He holds a golden cup forward. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat face, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white spots behind ears, slender build. soft teal and morning mist colors. 2:3 vertical. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Knight of Cups is the Messenger of Instinct—the young leopard cat exploring new territory with grace.
